title: Geas Memory Update
description: Per-mission change log recording what this mission's consolidating phase did to shared memory (memory/shared.md) and each agent's memory (memory/agents/{agent}.md). Canonical memory content lives in markdown files; this artifact records which entries were added, modified, or removed and why.

added.description: Shared-memory entries newly introduced during this mission's consolidating phase. Empty array if none.

modified.description: Existing shared-memory entries whose text or scope was changed. Empty array if none.

removed.description: Shared-memory entries removed or marked deprecated. A replacement is represented as a 'removed' entry plus an 'added' entry that references the prior memory_id in its reason. Empty array if none.

shared.description: Changes to shared memory (normative, team-wide). Cited in reviews.

agents.description: Changes to agent-specific memory. Each entry covers one agent. Agents with no changes this mission are omitted. Empty array if no agent memory changed.

agent.description: Agent type whose memory was changed. Implementation-specific concrete type.

added.description: New agent-memory entries introduced. Empty array if none.

modified.description: Existing agent-memory entries whose text or scope was changed. Empty array if none.

removed.description: Agent-memory entries removed. Empty array if none.

memory_id.description: Stable identifier for the memory entry in its markdown file.

reason.description: Why this entry was added or modified.

evidence_refs.description: Paths to evidence or deliberation artifacts that motivated the change. Empty array if none.
